testimonies.message:
Thanking God for His Hand of Mercy.
I want to thank God for His goodness in my life and family. I also want to thank God for His hand of mercy upon my life, for revealing the plans of the enemy and terminating it. I had an appointment to be at a place early but I got there late due to situations but when I got there God positioned a man for me and I was accepted to enter despite been late. I want to thank Him I was not among those that was sent out. I want to thank Him for His hand upon my life. May His name be praised forevermore.
testimonies.name: Sis Naomi.

testimonies.message:
Deliverance From Evil Serpent
During the course of the 21 days prayer & fasting vigil, I was ministered to by the WOG & that night, I had a dream where he gave me victory over a big snake on my roof. May His name be praised.
testimonies.name: Mrs Josephine Alabi

testimonies.message:
Thanking God for His Hand
I want to thank God for his revelation about the evil agenda of death concerning my son and husband and averting it with his mighty hand.
I want to thank God for his hand upon my business for everyday I pray that his hand should rest upon my business as instructed by the servant of God. I sell all my market to the last.
testimonies.name: Mummy Wisdom
